# Reading Order

A practical sequence for new readers who need to understand the stack from product thesis to deployable overlays.

## Recommended Sequence
1. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Platform Core/Digital Employee Platform PRD|Digital Employee Platform PRD]] - Defines Ruh.ai as a horizontal digital employee operating system built on OpenClaw, including the core product thesis, trust-boundary model, and go-to-market shape.
2. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Platform Core/System Design and MVP Execution Blueprint|System Design and MVP Execution Blueprint]] - Translates the PRD into a V1 architecture, control-plane/runtime split, collaboration model, and phased implementation sequence.
3. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Platform Core/Employee Pack Specification|Employee Pack Specification]] - Defines the reusable pack format, validation rules, deployment lifecycle, and governance contract for digital employees.
4. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Reference Packs/AI BuildOps Reference Pack|AI BuildOps Reference Pack]] - Instantiates the platform for AI product teams, covering intake, spec quality, implementation flow, eval gating, release, and incident learning.
5. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Reference Packs/Construction Project Operations Reference Pack|Construction Project Operations Reference Pack]] - Instantiates the platform for construction operations workflows such as RFIs, submittals, reporting, and meeting-action coordination.
6. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Tenant Overlays/AI BuildOps Tenant Overlay Kit|AI BuildOps Tenant Overlay Kit]] - Maps the reusable AI BuildOps pack into a GitHub, Linear, Slack, and Sentry operating stack for pilot and first-production use.
7. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Tenant Overlays/AI BuildOps Overlay Manifest|AI BuildOps Overlay Manifest]] - Machine-readable tenant overlay manifest for the AI BuildOps deployment, including trust boundary, connectors, workflows, and approval policies.
8. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Tenant Overlays/Construction Tenant Overlay Kit|Construction Tenant Overlay Kit]] - Maps the construction operations pack into a Procore, SharePoint, and Teams stack for project-scoped pilot and early production use.
9. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Tenant Overlays/Construction Overlay Manifest|Construction Overlay Manifest]] - Machine-readable tenant overlay manifest for construction operations, including project workspace topology, workflows, and approval mappings.
10. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Pilot Delivery/Design Partner Pilot Blueprint and Rollout Runbook|Design Partner Pilot Blueprint and Rollout Runbook]] - Defines the repeatable pilot model, qualification gates, rollout phases, and scorecards for proving digital employees with real customers.
11. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Go To Market/RPXTech AI Business Proposal|RPXTech AI Business Proposal]] - Frames a proposal for launching InSite AI powered by Ruh.ai on top of RPX's existing concrete-monitoring footprint.
12. [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Go To Market/Construction Proposal for RPX|Construction Proposal for RPX]] - Makes the case for a horizontal construction solution built from reusable digital employees and positions RPX as both buyer and future partner.
